integrity.ci_check: execution_state_version must match manifest.manifest_version; roadmap_sha256 must match manifest.output_file_hashes.FROSTGATE_CANONICAL_ROADMAP.md; any mismatch = drift

position.last_completed_pr_title: Provisioning to portal activation is deterministic
position.next_pr_title: Remediation portal routing validated with live data

gate.exit_condition: One paying client — invoice issued, paid, portal accessed, remediation roadmap opened

blocking_items.title: Startup key assertions active
blocking_items.reason: FG_BILLING_EVIDENCE_HMAC_KEY and MINISIGN_SECRET_KEY may be absent in Railway production with no detection — billing evidence and report signatures could be silently invalid on every engagement

blocking_items.title: Report quality scores real
blocking_items.reason: services/report_authority/engine.py:96 — _PLACEHOLDER_COVERAGE = 0.5 assigned to all five quality inputs; every delivered report shows fabricated quality scores; first invoice carries legal exposure

blocking_items.title: Remediation authority canonical
blocking_items.reason: api/remediation.py (legacy) and api/remediation_authority.py (canonical, 24 routes) are both active; portal remediation traffic may route to the wrong system; client remediation state is unreliable at scale

blocking_items.title: All portal pages render live data
blocking_items.reason: Reports, coverage, and attestation pages are unvalidated with live engagement data — client may encounter empty or broken content at the moment of report delivery

blocking_items.title: Connector credential pre-flight
blocking_items.reason: Invalid MS Graph credentials fail silently during scan execution — a 3-hour engagement can fail with no early warning; pre-flight catches this at scan launch

blocking_items.title: AI assistant auto-enables on QA approval
blocking_items.reason: apps/portal/app/assistant/page.tsx:72 — portal_ai_enabled flag requires manual Jason API patch per client; the highest habit-forming, highest-switching-cost feature is dark by default

blocking_items.title: Remediation portal routing validated with live data
blocking_items.reason: Portal remediation page is wired but untested with a real engagement — live-data behavior unconfirmed; split-brain risk exists until R-1 ships and R-2 validates the canonical path

blocking_items.title: Dry run H1-H18 complete
blocking_items.reason: No PR — operational milestone. Full engagement (tenant creation → scanning → report → portal delivery) has not been walked end-to-end. First paying client should not be the first time this sequence runs.

blocking_items.title: Anthropic credit balance verified
blocking_items.reason: No PR — operational check. Balance was $3.50 on 2026-05-31. AI executive summary generation during a live engagement could fail silently if balance is depleted.

blocking_items.title: Railway Hobby plan headroom verified
blocking_items.reason: No PR — operational check. A10 in CLIENT_READINESS is unchecked. Concurrent scan + AI query load during a live engagement is untested at current Railway tier.

recent_execution.title: feat(provisioning): P-1 — provisioning to portal activation is deterministic
recent_execution.note: Extends CompleteWorkflowRequest with optional client_id and engagement_id. When both provided, complete_workflow auto-creates portal_grant within the same transaction and returns raw_secret once. Client authenticates at POST /portal/authenticate with no operator step. Codex P2 fixes: audit_atomicity_svc.emit(portal_grant.created) for H13 coverage; client_id maxLength=255 and engagement_id maxLength=64 match portal_grants VARCHAR column sizes. 4 integration tests (P1-1 through P1-3, P1-4). G1.8 cleared.

recent_execution.title: feat(portal): FA-1 — validate portal pages with live engagement data
recent_execution.note: Fixes asset_name broken binding on attestation page (AssetResponse.name vs GovernanceAsset.asset_name in TS). Adds last_attested_at, next_attestation_due, owner_email to GET /governance/assets via batch GaAssetOwner lookup in list_assets handler. 5 acceptance tests (FA1-1 through FA1-5). G1.5 cleared.

recent_execution.title: feat(report-authority): TC-7 — replace placeholder quality scores with live evidence metrics
recent_execution.note: Removed _PLACEHOLDER_COVERAGE = 0.5. New services/report_authority/quality_inputs.py reads live FA evidence data (evidence_links, evidence_provenance, normalized_findings). Codex P2 fixes: evidence_coverage scoped to finding/normalized_finding links only; verification_coverage counts chain head records not raw rows. 15 tests. G1.3 cleared.

recent_execution.title: Evidence provenance foundation (shipped in prior PRs — confirmed complete 2026-07-14)
recent_execution.note: TC-1 spec (fa_evidence_provenance table, append-only RLS+triggers, provenance service, 22 tests) confirmed fully implemented in services/field_assessment/evidence_provenance.py and migrations/postgres/0105_fa_evidence_provenance.sql. No new PR needed. G1.2 cleared.

recent_execution.title: feat(trust-chain): assert MINISIGN_SECRET_KEY at startup (TC-0)
recent_execution.note: Both FG_BILLING_EVIDENCE_HMAC_KEY (pre-existing) and MINISIGN_SECRET_KEY (this PR) now raise RuntimeError at startup if absent in production. G1.1 cleared. Unblocks TC-1.

recent_execution.title: feat(identity): Entra ID identity assurance — RS256/ES256, 8-level ladder, 0-100 score
recent_execution.note: Resolved Codex audit concern about Entra ID stub status. api/identity_authority/providers/entra_provider.py confirmed full implementation. Enables TC-IDENTITY track to proceed.

recent_execution.title: feat(actor-attribution): 3-layer fingerprint chain, non-repudiation for regulators
recent_execution.note: Resolved Codex audit branch-contamination flag. Branch is now clean at audited commit.

recent_execution.title: feat(report-delivery): enterprise report delivery — approval, immutability, manifest, delivery audit
recent_execution.note: Confirmed real ReportLab PDF — resolved Codex pseudoformat concern. api/report_exports.py is byte-stable replay.

recent_execution.title: feat(evidence): server-side evidence file integrity
recent_execution.note: Immutable evidence claim established at file upload boundary.

on_pr_merge: Set last entry in recent_execution if not already present
Update position.current_pr to next unblocked PR
Set position.last_completed_pr to merged PR id + title
If PR clears a gate item: set gate.items[item] to true, increment gate.cleared, update gate.completion
If gate.cleared reaches gate.total: advance gate to Revenue Gate 2, reset cleared/total
on_commercial_milestone: Update mrr_current and leading_indicators with observed values
on_metric_update: Replace null with actual measurement once first data point exists
on_drift_detected: Set drift_status to one of: platform_expansion_active | off_sequence | gate_bypassed | mission_property_at_risk
If mission property at risk: set mission_check.any_property_at_risk to true and populate at_risk_detail
on_integrity_check: If mismatch: roadmap was edited without updating execution state — update hash and review changes
